name: jats

mif.reason: JATS (NISO Z39.96) is a machine-readable XML serialization of a scholarly article — a render target orthogonal to MIF Level-3 markdown structure, exactly like the pdf/book channels. It is composed directly from the SOURCES — the findings corpus and its primary-source citations — never from a rendered report, and carries the topic's MIF Level-1 identity in its article metadata. The MIF Level-3 source of truth lives in the generic report channel; the citation-leak gate still applies to the rendered body.

description: Render a topic's surviving findings into well-formed JATS (NISO Z39.96) XML directly from the SOURCES — the findings corpus and the primary materials its citations point to. Composes a scholarly article (article metadata, body, and a back-matter reference list) and serializes it as JATS XML. Never built from a rendered report.
